description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Golang Lint and Unit Test - admin-cli that runs on pull requests to specific branches and paths, and allows manual triggering. The workflow has two jobs: Lint and Test, both running on ubuntu-latest. The Lint job checks out the code, sets up Go 1.18, and runs golangci-lint on the admin-cli directory. The Test job checks out the code, sets up Go 1.18, compiles the code with make, and runs tests with make test.
